description: At year-end, the AP team needs to identify all vendors who require a Form 1099-NEC for services and prepare the forms for filing.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report of total payments made to all unincorporated vendors during the calendar year.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates the vendor payment summary report.

nodes.task_description: Identify all vendors who were paid more than the $600 threshold and require a 1099 form.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a list of all vendors who need a 1099.

nodes.task_description: Generate the Form 1099-NEC for each qualifying vendor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully generates the required tax forms.

nodes.task_description: Prepare the electronic filing for the IRS.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates the electronic file in the correct format for submission to the IRS.
